hero.title: Relay champs secure national gold!
hero.description: A fantastic run by our juniors at the Czech champs. Novák, Svoboda and Dvořák delivered a flawless race to take the win.

detail.title: East Bohemia Cup results from Adršpach
detail.excerpt: Our athletes handled the demanding sandstone labyrinth and brought home valuable points from another round of the series.

hero.imageAlt: Runner holding a map in a rugged sandstone forest

body.lead: Saturday delivered another East Bohemia Cup race with strong performances in the stony maze above Adršpach.
paragraphs: The courses mixed steep climbs with quick ridge passages. Course setters prepared several tricky sections in dense forest, so full focus was needed all the way to the finish.
Sunny autumn weather and colourful leaves made the experience special both for runners and spectators. Friendly atmosphere in the arena and plenty of cheering pushed everyone to give their best.

quote.text: This was one of the toughest events this season. Every second mattered in the sandstone blocks and precise contour reading decided the podium.
quote.author: Jan Kovář

body.closing: Thank you to everyone for representing the club. The next round takes place next weekend in Hradec Králové, so remember to submit your ORIS entry before Wednesday midnight.

hero.title: KOB Choceň
hero.description: We are a community of enthusiasts combining the love of running with navigation in nature. Since 1980 we have nurtured talent and organised races for everyone.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Inspire all generations to live actively and love the forest.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Lead the region and raise the next champions.
